steps.title: Check the sentence structure
steps.content: The main clause is ancient Egyptians slept on hard, elevated headrests. After the comma, their design needs a nonfinite modifier rather than a second independent clause.

steps.title: Avoid a comma splice
steps.content: A, B, and C all use finite verbs, which would create another independent clause joined only by a comma. The present participle makes a supplementary phrase describing what the design prioritized without forming a comma splice. The answer is D.
